CREATE TABLE test_data (id bigint, value bigint);
CREATE AGGREGATE quantile(val bigint, q double) RETURNS bigint EXTERNAL NAME 'aggr.quantile';
CREATE OR REPLACE AGGREGATE percentile(val bigint, p double) RETURNS bigint EXTERNAL NAME 'aggr.percentile';
GRANT EXECUTE ON AGGREGATE quantile TO PUBLIC;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id bigint, ref_id bigint);
SELECT a.id, quantile(a.value, 0.5) FROM test_data a GROUP BY a.id;
SELECT b.ref_id, percentile(a.value, 0.95) FROM test_data a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.ref_id GROUP BY b.ref_id;
CREATE AGGREGATE avg_value(val bigint) RETURNS double EXTERNAL NAME 'aggr.avg_value';
CREATE AGGREGATE sum_values(val bigint) RETURNS bigint EXTERNAL NAME 'aggr.sum_values';
DROP AGGREGATE quantile(val bigint, q double);
